name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.47: fixes the image migration on Railway. engines.node bumped to >=20.9.0 (sharp 0.35 requires it; Railway was installing Node 18 so every image failed), migration now preflights the image library and returns one clear error instead of failing per product, and the report accounting is honest (alreadyHosted / eligible / attempted / migrated / failed / remaining rather than mislabelling not-in-this-batch as already done). /health now reports node version and imaging readiness. Cumulative over v5.46.
